loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing capacity scores derived from active power, apparent power, and current against the 600kVA nameplate rating; headroom is a composite of these reserves.

loop1.title: UPS Load
loop1.note: Showing load factor and active power — headroom is omitted because the asset's rated capacity is unknown.

loop1.title: Output Load & Capacity — Composite
loop1.note: Showing output load (via load factor) and system frequency — direct bypass/output metrics are not measured by this UPS meter; using closest available proxies.
